plans.title: Deterministic Init Contract And Idempotent State Machine
plans.description: Define the deterministic init domain model, stable phases, idempotency, remote resource identities, and completion states.

tasks.title: T001 Define persisted init job, phase, command evidence, blocker, artifact, and context-pack schemas
tasks.description: Create stable backend payloads and persistence records for deterministic init.

tasks.title: T002 Define stable deterministic init phase names and idempotency rules
tasks.description: Make each init phase resumable and safe to retry.

tasks.title: T003 Define draft, chat, init job, generated workspace, and Workbench scope relationships
tasks.description: Preserve continuity from button press through generated workspace.

tasks.title: T004 Define remote-resource identity model for GitHub repo, Cloudflare Worker, route, D1, release, and installable app
tasks.description: Persist the external resource identities created or verified by init.

tasks.title: T005 Define init completion states: `ready`, `blocked_with_context`, `failed`, `cancelled`, and `resumable`
tasks.description: Distinguish success, external blockers, failure, cancellation, and retryable state.

plans.title: Deterministic New Project Button Creates Baseline And First Chat
plans.description: Change the New Project button to open the first chat, start or resume init, show progress, and gate business LLM work.

tasks.title: T006 Change New Project button flow to create or focus the first New Project chat before business LLM work
tasks.description: Make chat creation the primary surface for init and later business work.

tasks.title: T007 Start or resume deterministic init from the New Project button and link it to the draft/chat
tasks.description: Connect button, draft, chat, and init runner.

tasks.title: T008 Render init phase progress, blockers, commands, and retry actions in the chat timeline
tasks.description: Expose deterministic init progress where the user starts New Project.

tasks.title: T009 Block business LLM actions until init is `ready` or explicitly continued with blocked context
tasks.description: Prevent product prompts from starting before baseline context exists.

tasks.title: T010 Preserve New Project chat, draft, init job, and workspace continuity across app restarts
tasks.description: Recover live and completed init state without losing the first chat.

plans.title: Deterministic GitHub Repository Creation And Baseline Push
plans.description: Move repository creation, origin setup, baseline commit, push, and recovery payloads into deterministic init.

tasks.title: T011 Add GitHub preflight for `gh` auth, owner/repo availability, permissions, branch policy, and push capability
tasks.description: Detect GitHub readiness before remote effects.

tasks.title: T012 Implement deterministic GitHub repo create-or-verify behavior with no duplicate repos
tasks.description: Create or verify the repo idempotently.

tasks.title: T013 Implement origin setup and baseline branch push as an init phase
tasks.description: Push the generated baseline before business LLM work.

tasks.title: T014 Persist GitHub repo URL, branch, remote status, and command evidence
tasks.description: Expose exact repository state to UI and LLM context.

tasks.title: T015 Add blocked GitHub recovery payloads with exact commands and missing configuration
tasks.description: Make GitHub failures recoverable without hiding remote gaps.

plans.title: Deterministic Cloudflare Preview URL Worker D1 Migrations And Smoke Tests
plans.description: Move preview URL calculation, Worker, route, D1, migrations, deploy, and smoke verification into deterministic init.

tasks.title: T016 Add Cloudflare preflight for wrangler, account, zone, route, Worker, D1, and required secrets
tasks.description: Detect Cloudflare readiness before remote effects.

tasks.title: T017 Implement deterministic preview URL and API URL calculation for `preview.nienfos.com/{slug}`
tasks.description: Make preview URLs a default structured init output.

tasks.title: T018 Implement Cloudflare Worker, route, assets, and non-secret env create-or-verify behavior
tasks.description: Provision Cloudflare preview resources idempotently.

tasks.title: T019 Implement D1 database create-or-verify and baseline migration application
tasks.description: Provision the real preview data path before business LLM work.

tasks.title: T020 Implement Cloudflare preview deploy verification for Worker updates, protected routes, static assets, cache headers, and MIME types
tasks.description: Verify deployed preview behavior after apply.

tasks.title: T021 Implement web preview and Preview API smoke phases with persisted public evidence
tasks.description: Persist smoke evidence for UI and LLM context.

plans.title: Deterministic Flutter Workbench Feedback Updater And Runtime Baseline
plans.description: Move Flutter baseline creation, Workbench, feedback, updater, runtime profile, and strategy limits into deterministic init.

tasks.title: T022 Generate or verify Flutter baseline app, Android project, web target, and runtime profile wiring before business LLM work
tasks.description: Make Flutter app structure a deterministic init output.

tasks.title: T023 Wire Workbench/SDD metadata and Bridge-owned Workbench discovery during init
tasks.description: Make Workbench visibility available before product work.

tasks.title: T024 Wire Codex developer feedback template, source app identity, updater Bridge URL, and feedback queue routing during init
tasks.description: Make feedback capture and routing baseline infrastructure.

tasks.title: T025 Validate that preview runtime uses real Cloudflare Preview API/D1 and does not use mock/demo or placeholder URLs
tasks.description: Enforce real preview data paths during init.

tasks.title: T026 Enforce frontend strategy capability limits before Android/installable phases
tasks.description: Avoid claiming unsupported deliverables for non-installable strategies.

plans.title: Deterministic Android Preview Release And Bridge Installable Registration
plans.description: Move Android preview APK, GitHub prerelease, updater metadata, and Bridge installable registration into deterministic init.

tasks.title: T027 Build Android preview APK for Flutter/installable strategies against the real preview API
tasks.description: Build installable preview artifacts from deterministic init state.

tasks.title: T028 Create or verify GitHub prerelease `android-preview-v*` with APK and updater metadata
tasks.description: Publish the Initial Preview Baseline release artifact.

tasks.title: T029 Register or update Bridge installable app entry for supported strategies
tasks.description: Make the generated baseline discoverable in Bridge.

tasks.title: T030 Validate APK metadata, release metadata, Bridge installable discovery, and no mock/demo flags
tasks.description: Verify preview release truthfulness and real backend config.

tasks.title: T031 Persist Android release and installable-app blockers with exact retry commands
tasks.description: Report release blockers without claiming installability.

plans.title: Deterministic LLM Context Pack For The First Project Chat
plans.description: Write init-result and LLM start context from structured init state, attach it to the first chat, and feed it to business prompts.

tasks.title: T032 Write `.codex/factory/init-result.json` from structured init state
tasks.description: Persist machine-readable init output in the generated project.

tasks.title: T033 Write `.codex/factory/llm-start-context.md` with deterministic project context and LLM business-phase rules
tasks.description: Create the default starting context for product work.

tasks.title: T034 Attach the LLM context pack to the first New Project chat/session
tasks.description: Make the first chat ready to continue with business work.

tasks.title: T035 Ensure business generator/reviewer prompts consume init result instead of repeating deterministic setup work
tasks.description: Prevent LLM prompts from duplicating init responsibilities.

tasks.title: T038 Add backend tests for context pack contents, hashes, chat linking, and workspace mapping
tasks.description: Verify context pack determinism and continuity.

plans.title: Deterministic Init Observability Recovery Tests And Guardrails
plans.description: Add test coverage, recovery behavior, UI verification, Workbench continuity, and release guardrails for deterministic init.

tasks.title: T036 Add backend tests for init state transitions, idempotency, recovery, and phase ordering
tasks.description: Verify deterministic init service behavior.

tasks.title: T037 Add backend tests for GitHub and Cloudflare command construction, blocked recovery, and secret redaction
tasks.description: Protect remote command safety and logs.

tasks.title: T039 Add Flutter tests for New Project button behavior, init progress UI, blocked states, retry, and first-chat continuity
tasks.description: Verify the mobile New Project experience.

tasks.title: T040 Add release guardrail tests for preview real-data policy, no mock/demo defaults, Android prerelease tags, and Bridge installable registration
tasks.description: Enforce release data policy during init.

tasks.title: T041 Add Workbench/Kanban continuity tests for draft/init/job scope moving into the generated workspace
tasks.description: Verify Workbench continuity from init through generated project.
